'''nochafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:libacious|libacious]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libacious|libacious]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nochafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochafithi|nochafithi]] || [[word:nochafiji|nochafiji]] || [[word:nochafishi|nochafishi]] || [[word:nochafiki|nochafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochafuthuthu|nochafuthuthu]] || [[word:nochafujuju|nochafujuju]] || [[word:nochafushushu|nochafushushu]] || [[word:nochafukuku|nochafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochafuthu|nochafuthu]] || [[word:nochafuju|nochafuju]] || [[word:nochafushu|nochafushu]] || [[word:nochafuku|nochafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochafufthuf|nochafufthuf]] || [[word:nochafufjuf|nochafufjuf]] || [[word:nochafufshuf|nochafufshuf]] || [[word:nochafufkuf|nochafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochafethe|nochafethe]] || [[word:nochafeje|nochafeje]] || [[word:nochafeshe|nochafeshe]] || [[word:nochafeke|nochafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochafothotho|nochafothotho]] || [[word:nochafojojo|nochafojojo]] || [[word:nochafoshosho|nochafoshosho]] || [[word:nochafokoko|nochafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochafotho|nochafotho]] || [[word:nochafojo|nochafojo]] || [[word:nochafosho|nochafosho]] || [[word:nochafoko|nochafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochafofthof|nochafofthof]] || [[word:nochafofjof|nochafofjof]] || [[word:nochafofshof|nochafofshof]] || [[word:nochafofkof|nochafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfthĂŻf|nochafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfjĂŻf|nochafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfshĂŻf|nochafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfkĂŻf|nochafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nochafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nochafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nochafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nochafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfthĂŻf|nochafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfjĂŻf|nochafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfshĂŻf|nochafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfkĂŻf|nochafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfthĂŻf|nochafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfjĂŻf|nochafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfshĂŻf|nochafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nochafĂŻfkĂŻf|nochafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochafĂŠthĂŠ|nochafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nochafĂŠjĂŠ|nochafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nochafĂŠshĂŠ|nochafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nochafĂŠkĂŠ|nochafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochafathatha|nochafathatha]] || [[word:nochafajaja|nochafajaja]] || [[word:nochafashasha|nochafashasha]] || [[word:nochafakaka|nochafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochafatha|nochafatha]] || [[word:nochafaja|nochafaja]] || [[word:nochafasha|nochafasha]] || [[word:nochafaka|nochafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochafafthaf|nochafafthaf]] || [[word:nochafafjaf|nochafafjaf]] || [[word:nochafafshaf|nochafafshaf]] || [[word:nochafafkaf|nochafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nochafasha|nochafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nochafshĂ«asha|nochafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nochafroasha|nochafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nochafmuasha|nochafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nochafyaasha|nochafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonochafnkshĂ«asha|gonochafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonochafnkroasha|gonochafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonochafnkmuasha|gonochafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonochafnkyaasha|gonochafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nochachafasha|nochachafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nochachafshĂ«asha|nochachafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nochachafroasha|nochachafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nochachafmuasha|nochachafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nochachafyaasha|nochachafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonochachafnkshĂ«asha|gonochachafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonochachafnkroasha|gonochachafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonochachafnkmuasha|gonochachafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonochachafnkyaasha|gonochachafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nechĂŠfasha|nechĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nechĂŠfshĂ«asha|nechĂŠfshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nechĂŠfroasha|nechĂŠfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nechĂŠfmuasha|nechĂŠfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nechĂŠfyaasha|nechĂŠfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonechĂŠfnkshĂ«asha|gonechĂŠfnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonechĂŠfnkroasha|gonechĂŠfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonechĂŠfnkmuasha|gonechĂŠfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonechĂŠfnkyaasha|gonechĂŠfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nochfafasha|nochfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nochfafshĂ«asha|nochfafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nochfafroasha|nochfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nochfafmuasha|nochfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nochfafyaasha|nochfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonochfafnkshĂ«asha|gonochfafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonochfafnkroasha|gonochfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonochfafnkmuasha|gonochfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonochfafnkyaasha|gonochfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
